outcome: Canonical composition.update now patches persisted Composition canvas settings through ProjectEngine and ProjectStore without replacing graph entities.

contract.command: { type: 'composition.update', compositionId, patch } with exact own enumerable data fields
contract.patchPolicy: non-empty; undefined, accessors, symbols, extra fields and non-plain values reject
contract.name: non-empty, control-free, maximum 256 UTF-16 code units
contract.dimensions: positive safe integers, maximum 16384 per edge and 67108864 total pixels
contract.background: null is canonical transparency; CSS hex colors with 3, 4, 6 or 8 digits are accepted
contract.timestamps: explicit updatedAt must be an ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone; omitted updatedAt uses command context time on a real change
contract.noOp: equal non-empty patches retain the exact project reference, emit NO_CHANGES and do not advance ProjectStore revision
contract.identity: composition id, owner, createdAt, layer order, layer records and all external graph references are preserved
contract.inverse: published snapshot inverse restores the exact input graph; semantic composition.update inverse is retained where every touched field existed
contract.impact: only the target Composition is direct; no referencedBy, cascades or blockers for an existing valid target

coveredCases: maximum safe edge and pixel count
NaN, infinity, fraction, negative zero and oversized dimensions
accessor command and patch without getter execution

gates.name: accumulated-project-core
gates.command: vitest project*, compositionMutation*, compositionUpdate* and animationMutation* contract files with one worker

gates.name: typecheck
gates.evidence: No errors reported in owned files. Concurrent untracked features/slice/irregular/wandRegionCommands.ts, wandSelection.ts and tests/contract/wandSelection.test.ts fail with adapter/callback typing errors.

gates.name: lint
gates.evidence: oxlint exited 0 after removing the owned no-control-regex warning

gates.name: scope-diff-check
gates.command: git diff --check -- core/project/commands.ts core/project/applyCompositionCommands.ts core/project/applyCommand.ts core/project/impact.ts tests/contract/compositionUpdateCommand.test.ts

independentReview.evidence: Independent hostile-boundary and invariant review reran the focal suite at 8/8 and accepted command shape, immutable graph preservation, inverse/no-op semantics, batch/store/history behavior and minimal impact.

risks: Repository-wide typecheck remains red only in concurrent irregular wand work outside this slice.
Composition background uses the existing V1 null-or-string field; this command deliberately narrows new writes to null or CSS hex for portable preview/export behavior.
